items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Probably currently my favorite card gach
items.summary: Probably currently my favorite card gacha. At first I thought it copied Reverse 1999. But it doesn't, and I actually like it more. Music, visuals and gameplay are super immersive and unique. Hours pass before you realize it's time to do something else.
items.author: J B (Ocean Trace Studios)
